chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA. Constitutional Petition No. D- 43 of 2017. Date Order with signature of Hon’ble Judge 1.For orders on office objection as flag A. 2.For orders on M.A No. 241 of 2017. 3.For orders on maintainability of main case. 08.03.2022. Mr. Ghulam Dastagir Shahani, counsel for the petitioner. Mr. Sarfraz Ahmed Abbasi, advocate for the respondents No.1 to 3. Mr. Riaz Ahmed Soomro, advocqte for the respondent No.4. Mr. Muhammad Imran Abbasi, Asstt: Attorney General. ===== At the very outset, it is stated by learned counsel for the respondents No.1 to 3 that Shaheed Muhtarma Benazir Bhutto Medical University at Larkana has got no statutory rules; therefore, the case of petitioner would be governed by rule of “Master and Servant”. Learned counsel for the petitioner when was confronted with above was fair enough to say that he would not press the disposal of instant constitutional petition before this Court on merits, provided the petitioner is permitted to exhaust his remedy before any other forum in accordance with law. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE
